REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-09-2011 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON NOV-15-2011 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE WAS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON SEPTEMBER 1, 2011. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS NABIEL MUSLEH AND MARTEL TOLER'S MOTION TO DETERMINE SETTLEMENT WAS NOT IN GOOD FAITH IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS NOT A PROPER USE OF THE CCP 877.6 PROCEDURE SINCE ITS CLEAR AIM IS TO PRECLUDE TYFOOD MEDIA FROM ASSERTING ANY DEFENSES BASED ON THE SETTLEMENT IN CASE NUMBER 509319. YET NO SUCH DEFENSES ARE BEFORE THIS COURT ON THIS MOTION. WHEN AND IF TYFOOD MEDIA SEEKS A RULING IN THE OTHER CASE REGARDING THE AFFECT OF THE SETTLEMENT, MR. TOLER AND MR. MUSLEH CAN OPPOSE THAT MOTION BY MAKING ANY ARGUMENTS THEY BELIEVE APPROPRIATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
ORDER REGARDING GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-15-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Determine Settlement Not In Good Faith
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS NABIEL MUSLEH AND MARTEL TOLER'S MOTION TO DETERMINE SETTLEMENT NOT IN GOOD FAITH.

APPEARANCES: Eric D. Miller, Esq. of Miller Hauser Law Group LLP 354-0135 for defts & moving parties; Mark L. Mosley, Esq. of Seiler Epstein Ziegler & Applegate, LLP 979-0500 for deft & opposing party Tyfood Media, Inc.

RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's' Motion to Determine Settlement Was Not in Good Faith is denied. The motion is not a proper use of the CCP 877.6 procedure since its clear aim is to preclude Tyfood Media from asserting any defenses based on the settlement in case number 509319. Yet no such defenses are before this court on this motion. When and if Tyfood Media seeks a ruling in the other case regarding the affect of the settlement, Mr. Toler and Mr. Musleh can oppose that motion by making any arguments they believe appropriate. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2011 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-15-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
